title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Plimpton 322: Babylonian Mathematics
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Plimpton 322: Babylonian Mathematics.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Plimpton 322: Babylonian Mathematics.

translation.text: From 'Plimpton 322: Babylonian Mathematics': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
